methodology_summary: Demand validated through public-data acquisition process: (1) regulatory timeline from official announcements establishes mandatory deadlines, (2) market-size data from TWSE defines the addressable customer population, (3) willingness-to-pay estimated via time-savings model with comparable pricing benchmarks.

regulatory_timeline.customer_pain: Direct cost exposure; companies need real-time rate monitoring
Annual deadline; missed submission triggers penalties
All 1,029 listed companies required; high compliance pressure

regulatory_timeline.event: IFRS S1/S2 phased adoption begins (large listed companies)
regulatory_timeline.customer_pain: New disclosure framework requiring gap analysis and system upgrades

regulatory_timeline.event: Enhanced TWSE climate disclosure (IFRS S2-aligned) required
regulatory_timeline.customer_pain: Physical and transition risk assessment, scenario analysis required

total_listed_companies.note: All submitted 2024 sustainability reports – defines addressable market

carbon_fee_regulated_entities.source: MOENV carbon fee scope: emitters >25,000 tCO2e in power and manufacturing
carbon_fee_regulated_entities.note: Subset of listed companies facing direct carbon cost; highest urgency segment

esg_consulting_firms_taiwan.note: B2B2X channel: each firm serves multiple listed company clients

assumptions.description: ESG manager or consultant manually checking FSC/MOENV/TWSE websites, reading PDFs, summarising updates, preparing internal alerts

monthly_savings.note: Conservative: assumes tool saves 10 of 12 hours per month

pricing_recommendation.logic: Basic plan at NT$12,000 < NT$15,000 monthly savings = ROI positive from day 1

comparable_products.name: Bloomberg ESG Data
comparable_products.note: Enterprise ESG data; higher price, broader scope, not Taiwan-specific

comparable_products.name: Refinitiv ESG
comparable_products.note: Global ESG ratings; does not cover Taiwan regulatory monitoring
